title: modrinth pizza
description: This mod adds modrinth pizza, but now actually. Not as april fools joke.
body:
***Modrinth Pizza - The Ultimate Pizza Experience!***

What started as an April 1st joke is now a reality!

Introducing Modrinth Pizza, a quirky and fun Minecraft mod that brings a delicious twist to your crafting adventures! Ever wondered what it would be like to craft a pizza in Minecraft? Well, wonder no more!

How to Make Your Very Own Modrinth Pizza:
Step 1: Craft the Raw Modrinth Pizza
To get started, you'll need to craft a Raw Modrinth Pizza. Here’s the recipe:

1 Water Bucket

3 Wheat

1 Sponge (any type of sponge will work!)

Combine these ingredients in a crafting table, and you’ll get a Raw Modrinth Pizza.

Step 2: Cook the Raw Pizza
Now that you’ve got your Raw Modrinth Pizza, it’s time to cook it! Simply place the Raw Modrinth Pizza in a Smoker and wait for it to transform into the delicious, fully-cooked Modrinth Pizza.

What Does It Do?
This mod doesn’t just add a fun crafting recipe—it adds a whole new level of humor and novelty to your Minecraft experience! It's perfect for pranksters, meme-lovers, and anyone looking to add a bit of lightheartedness to their gameplay.

So, whether you’re playing solo or with friends, Modrinth Pizza is sure to bring some laughs and a little bit of unexpected joy to your Minecraft world.
